finding_results.notes: Converted the cited clipped narration beats into complete sentences while keeping the pressure terse and the bed-listening sequence quiet.
finding_results.summary: All cited fragment-heavy narration beats now use explicit subjects and finite verbs.

finding_results.notes: The aftermath now centers on one dominant attempted disclosure after Sarah takes the couch: Nate names the sexual lie in his own head, gets up to tell her, fails in the hall, and consciously chooses not to confess that night.
finding_results.summary: The post-couch sequence now lands one near-confession arc instead of replaying the refusal in multiple passes.

finding_results.notes: The post-couch section now runs 59 lines from the confession rehearsal through the final image, cuts the abstract moral-summary loops, preserves the rehearsal material, and closes on Nate staying in bed while Sarah shifts on the couch.
finding_results.summary: The chapter tail is compressed, concrete, and ends on action rather than thesis.

finding_results.notes: Sarah's triple sentence now uses contractions throughout while preserving the year-of-life, kitchen, and name-as-prank structure; the chapter also no longer uses uncontracted 'do not' or 'not because... but because' constructions.
finding_results.summary: Sarah's pressure-register now sounds spoken rather than composed.

summary: Revised the cited clipped narration, tuned Sarah's confrontation register toward high-contraction pressured speech, and rebuilt the post-couch aftermath into one dominant near-confession that ends on Nate's concrete non-confession.
